name: Linux execveat memfd Live Kernel Proof
description: Lab-only Linux live-kernel proof that the eBPF raw syscall path observes memfd_create followed by execveat(AT_EMPTY_PATH) and surfaces fileless_execveat telemetry/detection evidence. This profile must run only on a disposable or approved Linux lab endpoint with the eBPF collector active.
claim_boundary: Lab-only live-kernel eBPF proof for execveat(AT_EMPTY_PATH) syscall visibility. Passing this profile proves the selected lab host emitted and persisted the expected fileless_execveat evidence for this fixture only; it does not prove broad Linux eBPF production readiness, kernel matrix coverage, or fallback auditd parity.
preconditions: linux_ebpf_readiness_probe artifact for the exact host is active or explicitly accepted degraded
Tamandua Linux agent is enrolled and eBPF collector health is healthy
BPF object is installed and sys_enter_security raw tracepoint is attached
cc is available on the lab endpoint to build the temporary helper
Runner is a disposable or approved Linux lab endpoint, not the operator workstation

tests.name: memfd_create followed by execveat(AT_EMPTY_PATH) reaches telemetry
tests.claim_boundary: Requires live eBPF sensor evidence from this lab host; auditd-only process_create evidence is insufficient for pass.
